series_metadata.series_title: Office of Criminal Justice Services (OCJS) State Grant Files
series_metadata.series_description: All financial and programmatic records related to the receipt and expenditure of state grant funding including, but not limited to, grant applications and supporting documentation; award and acceptance forms; financial reports including budgets, cash requests, expenditures, and source documentation; records of purchase and/or acquisition; project information; use agreements; and relevant audit reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain three (3) years from the date of submission of the final expenditure report. ; Paper: Retain three (3) years from the date of submission of the final expenditure report., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
